title: Anatomy of a Blockchain Transaction
description: A visual breakdown of the core components that make up a single transaction in a typical blockchain, such as Bitcoin or Ethereum.
relationships: Inputs provide the cryptographic proof of ownership for the funds being spent
Outputs specify the new owner(s) of the funds via their public addresses
The Digital Signature authorizes the transfer of funds from the Inputs
The Transaction Hash is a unique fingerprint generated from all other transaction data
